## Checklist

- [ ] `make test` passes on macOS.
- [ ] Added/updated a test under `tests/` for any behavior change.
- [ ] New source files carry the `/* SPDX-License-Identifier: ISC */` header.
- [ ] No new runtime dependencies.
- [ ] If this touches the `(cid,port)->path` convention, it was discussed in an issue first.
